title: The hunt for Waiheke’s last stoat gets an AI assist
description_clean: As native bird numbers soar, a Waiheke conservation team is pinning its hopes on AI-powered traps to catch the last remaining stoats. The post The hunt for Waiheke’s last stoat gets an AI assist appeared first on Farmers Weekly .
summary: A conservation team on Waiheke Island is using AI-powered traps in an effort to catch the last remaining stoats as native bird numbers rise.
